name: thermy
description: Print text, images, and QR codes to mini Bluetooth thermal printers

tools.name: scan
tools.description: Scan for available Bluetooth thermal printers

tools.name: print_text
tools.description: Print text with font size, alignment, borders

tools.name: print_qr
tools.description: Generate and print a QR code from text/URL

device_address.title: Printer Bluetooth Address
device_address.description: Bluetooth address of your thermal printer (e.g. AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF). Leave empty to use scan tool.
